Vocabulary - वनस्पतयः ‍शान्तिः | Story 14

01 May 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
महाटवी great forest
परितः on all sides / surround
भवति become / happen
कृत्वा having done
अटवी forest
अनावृष्टि drought
शुष्क dry
देशान्तर another country
प्रयाण journey
बुभुक्षा hunger
अविचिन्त्य not to be comprehended or conceived

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
चन्द्रः भूमिं परितः भ्रमति The moon goes around the Earth.
अहं भवनं परितः अटनं कृतवान् I walked around the building.
उत्पीठिकां परितः वयम् उपविष्टवन्तः We sat around the table.
   
प्रतीक्षां कृत्वा पश्यतु Wait and see what happens.
भोजनं कृत्वा निद्रां करोतु Have a nap after meals.
शीघ्रं स्नानं कृत्वा आगच्छतु Go and have a bath quickly.
प्रयत्नं कृत्वा किमपि खादतु Try and eat something.

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
